# SecKeychainItem

**Class**

An opaque type that represents a keychain item.

## Declaration

```swift
class SecKeychainItem
```

## Overview

A [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainItem] object for a certificate that is stored in a keychain can be safely cast to a [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecCertificate] for use with [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/certificate-key-and-trust-services].

## Conforms To

- Equatable
- Hashable
